pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime environment specified in the migration goal.

src/main/resources/Login.fxml.general_idea: Update the FXML controller reference to match the new package structure.
src/main/resources/Login.fxml.why_exists: Runtime exception (ClassNotFoundException or FXML loading error) because the controller class was moved to a subpackage.
